glosses.ja: とても熱い; 灼熱の

translations.en: Careful, the dish is very hot.
translations.es: Cuidado, la bandeja del horno está muy caliente.
translations.de: Vorsicht, die Auflaufform ist sehr heiß.
translations.pt: Cuidado, a assadeira está muito quente.
translations.vi: Cẩn thận, khay nướng rất nóng.
translations.nl: Pas op, de ovenschaal is gloeiend heet.
translations.hi: सावधान, बेकिंग डिश बहुत गर्म है।
translations.da: Pas på, fadet er meget varmt.
translations.ja: 気をつけて、耐熱皿がとても熱いです。

tokens.explanation: Interjection calling for caution; discourse marker opening the sentence.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'plat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate complement after 'être'.

sentences.target: Je pose la tasse brûlante ici.

translations.fr: Je pose la tasse brûlante ici.
translations.en: I'm putting the hot cup here.
translations.de: Ich stelle die heiße Tasse hier ab.
translations.pt: Vou colocar a xícara quente aqui.
translations.he: אני מניח את הכוס החמה כאן.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt cái cốc nóng ở đây.
translations.nl: Ik zet de hete mok hier neer.
translations.hi: मैं गर्म कप यहाँ रख रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg setter den varme koppen her.
translations.id: Aku taruh cangkir panas di sini.
translations.sv: Jag ställer den heta koppen här.
translations.da: Jeg sætter den varme kop her.
translations.ja: 熱いカップをここに置きます.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject.
Main verb (1st person singular, present indicative).
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'tasse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'pose'.
Adjective, feminine singular; attributive modifier agreeing with 'tasse'.
Locative adverb indicating place; complements the verb 'pose'.

sentences.target: Ce soleil brûlant fatigue tout le monde.
sentences.reading: /sə sɔlɛj bʁylɑ̃ fatiɡ tu lə mɔ̃d/

translations.fr: Ce soleil brûlant fatigue tout le monde.
translations.ipa: /sə sɔlɛj bʁylɑ̃ fatiɡ tu lə mɔ̃d/
translations.es: Este sol abrasador cansa a todos.
translations.de: Diese glühende Sonne macht alle müde.
translations.ko: 이 타는 듯한 햇볕이 모두를 지치게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 这炽热的太阳让大家都累了。
translations.yue: 呢個毒辣嘅太陽曬到大家都好攰。
translations.pt: Este sol escaldante cansa todo mundo.
translations.he: השמש הלוהטת הזאת מעייפת את כולם.
translations.vi: Mặt trời gay gắt này làm mọi người mệt.
translations.nl: Deze verzengende zon maakt iedereen moe.
translations.hu: Ez az égető nap mindenkit kifáraszt.
translations.hi: यह तपता सूरज सबको थका देता है।
translations.el: Αυτός ο καυτός ήλιος κουράζει τους πάντες.
translations.nb: Denne brennhete sola gjør alle slitne.
translations.id: Matahari yang terik ini membuat semua orang lelah.
translations.sv: Den här gassande solen gör alla trötta.
translations.ro: Soarele acesta dogoritor îi obosește pe toți.
translations.da: Den brændende sol gør alle trætte.
translations.ja: この灼熱の太陽はみんなを疲れさせます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, introducing 'soleil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Adjective, masculine singular; attributive modifier of 'soleil'.
Main verb (3rd person singular, present indicative); predicate of the sentence.
Quantifier/determiner modifying 'monde' in the fixed expression 'tout le monde' meaning 'everyone'.
Definite article within the noun phrase 'le monde'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'tout le monde' functioning as the direct object ('everyone').

sentences.target: Vos sièges sont brûlants en plein soleil.
sentences.reading: /vo sjɛʒ sɔ̃ bʁylɑ̃ ɑ̃ plɛ̃ sɔlɛj/

translations.fr: Vos sièges sont brûlants en plein soleil.
translations.ipa: /vo sjɛʒ sɔ̃ bʁylɑ̃ ɑ̃ plɛ̃ sɔlɛj/
translations.en: Your seats are scorching in full sun.
translations.es: Sus asientos están abrasadores a pleno sol.
translations.de: Ihre Sitze sind in der prallen Sonne glühend heiß.
translations.it: I vostri sedili sono roventi sotto il sole diretto.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们的座椅在烈日下烫得很厉害。
translations.yue: 你哋啲座位喺大太陽底下熱到燙手。
translations.ru: Ваши сиденья на палящем солнце раскалены.
translations.pt: Os seus bancos estão escaldantes em pleno sol.
translations.vi: Ghế của bạn nóng rực dưới nắng gắt.
translations.nl: Jullie stoelen zijn snikheet in de volle zon.
translations.uk: Ваші сидіння розпечені під прямим сонцем.
translations.hu: Az üléseitek tűzforrók a tűző napon.
translations.hi: तेज़ धूप में आपकी सीटें बहुत गर्म हैं।
translations.pl: Wasze siedzenia są rozpalone w pełnym słońcu.
translations.el: Τα καθίσματά σας καίνε στον δυνατό ήλιο.
translations.nb: Setene deres er glovarme i stekende sol.
translations.id: Kursi kalian sangat panas di bawah terik matahari.
translations.sv: Era säten är stekheta i full sol.
translations.ro: Scaunele voastre sunt încinse în plin soare.
translations.cs: Vaše sedadla jsou na plném slunci rozpálená.
translations.da: Jeres sæder er glohede i fuld sol.
translations.fi: Istuimenne ovat polttavan kuumat suorassa auringossa.
translations.ja: 直射日光であなたのシートは焼けるように熱いです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person plural/formal; agrees with plural 'sièges'.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person plural, present) linking subject to predicate adjective.
Adjective, masculine plural; predicate complement agreeing with 'sièges'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Adjective used in the fixed phrase 'en plein soleil' meaning 'in full sun'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'en' within the prepositional phrase.
